title: Case Processing Centre: Ottawa, Ontario - Canada.ca
content:
## Case Processing Centre: Ottawa, Ontario

## Temporary Resident Visa applications from within Canada:
- To obtain additional information
- To download the application forms and the instruction guide
To submit a Temporary Resident Visa (TRV) application from within Canada, mail your application to:
Temporary Resident Visa Section Case Processing Centre – Ottawa P.O. Box 8780 STN T CSC Ottawa, Ontario K1G 5A9
If sent by private courier:
Temporary Resident Visa Section Case Processing Centre – Ottawa 365 Laurier Avenue West Ottawa, Ontario K1A 1L1
Important: Complete addresses must be listed on all packages. Documents sent without complete addresses risk being misdirected or returned to sender causing application processing delays.
See the How to Apply page for mailing instructions .
If you have a question about your application, contact us by using our Web form .
